overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Origins) showing the protagonist Bayek walking through a desert canyon at night. The character moves steadily along a path transitioning from wide sandy valleys to narrow rocky canyons under a starlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide desert valley with sandy path and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a sandy desert path through a wide open valley with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation forming the left boundary of the valley
rocky mountain slopes rising on the right side of the path
tall mountain peak visible in the distance against the night sky
wide dirt and sand trail winding through the desert valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide open desert valley at night, following a sandy path between distant mountain ranges. The starlit sky is fully visible above, and sparse desert shrubs dot the landscape. The terrain is flat and composed of packed sand and dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon entrance with uneven terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from smooth sand to rocky gravel as the canyon narrows

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path becomes rockier and the canyon walls begin to close in on both sides

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising prominently on the left side
rocky hillside with loose stones and boulders on the right
uneven trail covered in gravel and small rocks replacing the sandy surface

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions as the wide valley gives way to a narrower canyon. The ground becomes rocky and uneven, with gravel replacing the smooth sand. The mountain ranges draw closer, becoming distinct cliff walls on either side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls

events.description: path curves to the right as the canyon winds between rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding rocky path with steep cliffs rising closely on both sides

entered.detail: tall layered rock wall with visible sedimentary strata rising immediately to the left

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly as the character moves deeper into the rocky terrain. A steep cliff face rises immediately to the left with visible rock layers, while the path winds through the enclosed space. The ground remains rocky and uneven, requiring careful navigation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast desert valley that gradually constricts into a narrow rocky canyon under a starlit sky. It begins with the character walking along a flat, sandy path through a wide open expanse dotted with sparse shrubs and flanked by distant mountain ranges. As the character advances, the open terrain begins to tighten, and the smooth sand shifts into uneven gravel and rocky ground. The scene then transitions as the distant mountains draw closer, evolving into towering cliff walls that hem in the path on both sides.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wide desert path constricts into a narrow, imposing rocky canyon. It begins with the character moving deeper into the terrain, where the open space gradually diminishes. As the path winds forward, a steep cliff face with distinct rock layers rises sharply to the left, further enclosing the environment. The scene then shifts toward a more confined corridor of stone, where the ground becomes increasingly rocky and uneven. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they navigate the tightening passage, fully immersed in the towering walls of the canyon.
